dialogueLines.text: What, because I smile, haha? Smiling's just a little something that I like to do to deal with the day! Though, oh, that's what you meant, I... oh, I see. I, look, this is kind of a lot, I, I had better go...! I'll cherish the Ambrosia, though, OK?!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I got you more Ambrosia, Dusa, and I hope this is OK. I figure maybe you could use this for the lounge? Special events, guests, that sort of thing?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: ...I'm sorry that I flew away last time you brought me something like this, Prince... I mean, Zagreus. It's really strange for me to call you that, I... when I started here, they told me not to even speak with you, and now, uh... here we are...!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Well, look, if I listened to everything I was told, my life would be a lot different and a lot worse off, I think! So... who cares what anybody says? I enjoy your company.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: And I enjoy yours, too! Wasn't long ago that I was just a lonely gorgon head, all by myself in the big Underworld, looking for steady work. And then, I heard about the opening here, in your father's House? Well I got it! It seemed too good to be real. And then, there was you...

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I remember when we first met. You were carrying three bowls for Cerberus and bumped right into me. It all went flying, but you cleaned up half of it before it hit the ground. Then flew away before I got your name. I thought I'd never see you again.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: I was so embarrassed! Worse... I thought I was done for, here. But, I got another chance! That was your doing, wasn't it? You've been looking out for me, all this time! That's so sweet of you, I... I don't know how to thank you, I... I, I better put this Ambrosia away, for safe keeping, OK?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Dusa, I was thinking that this batch of Ambrosia ought to hold the lounge over for quite a while! Keep things livelier for everyone. And, please take a bottle for yourself, won't you? As a token of my affection.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh! Y-you said your affection, huh, I... wow! I... really like you, also, Zagreus. I liked you from the start! You were so different from your father, and Miss Nyx, I could just tell, but... wait, what am I saying, I am such a dummy! You're just being friendly with me, right...?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I would be more than that, if it pleased you. You're very wonderful, and... you light up this House. But I would never risk our friendship, so, if this is where we draw the boundary, please, just let me know.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Um... wait, wait. Wait, wait. Did you just say I'm... wonderful?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I did, indeed. And I am glad to get it off my chest, if you must know! Though... what about you? How do you feel?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: I, wow, I, I never thought you'd... have those kinds of feelings, for somebody like me. It's really nice to hear! It makes me feel complete. But, um, Zagreus, I don't know if I can be what you need, I mean? Wait. You weren't, you weren't just being nice to me for all this time, because...?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: What? No, no, Dusa, of course not, I... ungh, why is it so damn difficult to share one's feelings with somebody else? I don't want to ruin what we have. If only you could see what's in my heart.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, hahaha, I was just checking, don't feel bad, OK? You don't seem capable of hiding what's in your heart. And I mean that in the best possible way. I'm so happy, it's just... all this is a lot, and, I'm on duty right now, but... see you soon...?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: ...sorted the cutlery, wiped the counters, replaced the candles, did the dishes, swept the floor, inspected the barrels, let's see what else, oh!! The Prince, it's you!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: It's me! Dusa, I'm impressed you're able to manage this whole lounge all by yourself. How do you do it, what's your secret?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Hahaha, secret? I'm two weeks behind schedule with this place, at least! Fortunately, no one here seems very good at keeping time, so, no one's gotten on my case just yet, but... oh, you aren't going to tell, are you?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Of course not. What's behind schedule, though? This place doesn't seem any worse for wear than usual.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, that's just it! Miss Nyx, she tasked me with a pretty big project a while back, to make this place worthy of the name, which means... there's so much left to do, I need to get everything ready, please, excuse me, Prince!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: ...patch up the seating, update the menu, clean the stove, stock the honor bar, sweep the rug, dust the rafters, mop the flooring, pay the broker, oh!! Um, sorry, Prince, way behind on my assignment, so if you'll excuse me, please...?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Dusa, wait, before you fly away... there must be something I can do, to help pitch in with everything? Doesn't matter how good you are at your job, what you're describing, that's more than one individual can handle!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Your Highness, please! I know you mean well, but I have this! Wish everybody wouldn't doubt me all the time, like that House Contractor, just gets to stand around, waiting for work orders! Unless they come from me, then nooo.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: The House Contractor isn't cooperating with you, huh. No wonder so many lounge renovations are clogged up in the works. Though maybe I can grease the wheels a bit?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: AAH, I completely forgot!! I need to get more cooking grease for the Head Chef! I have to go!!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: ...patch up the seating, update the menu, clean the stove, stock the honor bar, sweep the rug, dust the rafters, mop the flooring, pay the broker, oh!! Um, sorry, Prince, way behind on my assignment, so if you'd excuse me, please...?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Dusa, wait, before you fly away... there must be something I can do, to help pitch in with everything? Doesn't matter how good you are at your job, what you're describing, that's more than one individual can handle!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Your Highness, please! I know you mean well, but I have this! Wish everybody wouldn't doubt me all the time, like that House Contractor, just gets to stand around, waiting for work orders! Unless they come from me, then nooo.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Ooh, that might be my fault. I've been giving the Contractor lots of work. Some of those lounge orders must be coming from you, right? This place is really shaping up!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Wha-wha, wait, then you're the one who's been authorizing all these improvements?! Oh my, oh my, aaaah!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: The lounge is really starting to look nice lately, Dusa! All your hard work is really paying off!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Hah! Why, thank you, Prince, it's just that, lately, the House Contractor's been slightly more agreeable I guess, working a little faster, maybe, but there's still a lot we have to do, so, you just wait!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Um, Prince Zagreus...? I just wanted to say something, if you have a little time? I know you're really busy... I can come back.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Wait, no, now's fine, of course, what is it, Dusa? I'm not so busy, by the way, and always happy to check in. Wait, is something wrong?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: No, nononono, it is just the opposite, I... can't believe you helped me, with the lounge. I don't think anyone has ever helped me out like you did, cleaning up after Cerberus, and the new rug, and the kitchen, and, just, all of this!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: It was my pleasure, really. All of us use the lounge, don't we? This House can really be a lot, but in the lounge here, things are easier a bit, I think. I'm so glad we have you watching over it.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Y, you really mean that, Prince...? But you don't know what this means to me. I'm finally caught up on work! W, what am I going to do? I, I don't know what I'm going to do with all this extra time! I have to go, and plan everything out!!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: You please take care of yourself, OK, Prince?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: I sometimes get so worried for you, Zagreus...!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Don't worry, Prince, I have everything here well under control...!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: I hope you have a great whatever time it is out there, Highness!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: I will definitely keep an eye on things while you are out!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Just in the middle of a wall-to-wall inspection right now, Prince!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Heard everything's been good lately between you and Miss Meg!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Eternal friends forever, right, Prince Zagreus?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: So glad to see you back here, Your Highness!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Made sure the House was nice and tidy for you, Prince!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Your Highness, hi! All's well here, nothing to report!!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Looks like we've both been keeping busy, huh, Your Highness?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Whew, I have been so busy, lately, Prince! The same as you!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Sorry, not much time to chat more right now, Prince!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: We'll have to catch up in the lounge sometime, huh, Prince?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, haha, you startled me, there, Prince!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Hold on, Prince! Think I saw some dust I missed up there!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Sorry, got to file this report, now, Prince!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Nice to see you, now I'm off to clean the rafters once again!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: I'm on duty right now, but it's really nice to see you like this, Prince!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: I know your job gets frustrating sometimes, so please remember to take breaks, all right?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: I hope you're always finding joy in work like I do, Prince!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: From the reports I've seen it looks like you've been doing such great work out there!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: I, ah, hope you're having a nice stay! Even though you don't want to live here anymore, Your Highness!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Erm, Dusa? Turns out that I may be stopping back from time to time, like this. But, please don't bother picking up my room. I won't be staying long.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, hahaha, sure! But I'll just keep an eye on things in there, from time to time, in case you change your mind, um, so, good-bye!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Um, Prince? Your father, I, I think he's pretty steamed right now, about something, so, maybe you could stay away from him? Or... I could tell him you're not here?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: That's quite all right, Dusa. I'm not afraid of him, and neither should you be. You're the best help he's ever found.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Just, ah, just doing my job, here, Prince...!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, um, so, hi Prince! So, is there anything I can get you, or maybe tidy up some more, or... I just thought maybe you'd like something to drink? Sometime?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Oh! A drink sometime sounds wonderful, Dusa, maybe tomorrow assuming I'm not getting out of here by then...?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Whaa, I mean, it's no big deal, I mean, forget I asked, or anything, I'm sorry, bye!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Uh, um, I just, wanted to apologize, because, I think maybe I didn't act very appropriately last time you spoke to me? But I just really, really like this job, and promise I will always do my very best, so, I just hope I'll have another chance?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Dusa, please, there's no need to apologize! You've been doing a wonderful job, really!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: I... what? You really mean it, Prince, I... thank you, thanks so much!!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Um, I, I, I, I'm sorry, I, I better get back to my cleaning...!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, Prince! Persephone, your mother, wow, she's, woww...! It's no wonder you wanted to try to find her. She's something else! Although, I guess you didn't know that till you met her, huh? But, still!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: It's definitely an adjustment, with my mother here. Especially for her! I'm glad the two of you are getting on all right. I guess things will be different, now, but... hopefully, it's for the better, isn't it?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Are you kidding?! Ah, didn't mean to be so rude, it's just, I think it's definitely better, now! We're like a complete team!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Um, Prince, so, is it... really true, then, that you're staying, and... that you'll be working here, officially, I guess?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I... well, when you put it that way, yes, I guess it is! We're going to try and make it work like this, for now.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Well you know what this means, don't you? We're official co-workers now!! Isn't that so exciting? We can share our latest learnings, compare notes about the challenges we're up against, run into one another in the hall...

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Dusa... we've been doing everything you said this entire time.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: But it is not the same! The entire feel of it's completely different, now! You'll see! So, OK!! Bye!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: ...I think I finally know a little more about how you must feel, Dusa. Working for Father, I mean. I was so intent on running away from here, but... here I am.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Look, Prince, um... your father's always been a pretty scary god. And, this is something between you and him. Though, if you can forgive him, I guess... it means you'd stay? And I would like that, so... that's where I stand! I know it's really complicated, though.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Dusa, this whole place, it looks immaculate! That's even after all Olympus came here for that giant feast? How did you get everything clean so fast?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, ha-hah! Well! I guess I have my ways, Prince. Sometimes you get one of those jobs and you just want to give it everything you've got, you know? I get a lot of jobs like that! Feeding Cerberus, cleaning the rafters! But this one? I just knew it was the perfect job for me!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, um, hi, Your Highness? I, just wanted you to know, that if you do get out, I, we are going to miss you. Around here. OK? So, bye...!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Whoa, why, Prince, you're... wait, you're back? I mean, I thought...! I heard that...! How come you're still here?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Oh, hah, yes! I made it pretty far! On that account you heard correctly, Dusa, but... turns out I have unfinished business here, so... I should be turning up like this from time to time.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh wow, well, that's great!! I mean, I hope it's great? I mean, if you agree it's great, I also think it's great! If that's OK?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: How's your relationship with Nyx been lately, Dusa? She strikes me as a pretty intense supervisor. You getting on OK?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, Miss Nyx? I'll do whatever she says! Why, did she say something about me? She did, oh, why would you be asking otherwise, oh no. Am I losing my job?!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Hey, no, no no, it's not like that, it's just... a feeling that I've had from glimpses of the interactions that I've seen between you two. I haven't always got along with Nyx, but I know she cares deeply about this House and everyone in it. Including you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Hahaha, well, that's nice to know! She cares about my work performance, that's for very sure, and I am doing everything I can to live up to and exceed her expectations, tell her that!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Aah! The Prince! Miss Nyx, she, I, I'm not supposed to talk to you! I have to go!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Dusa, hey, hey what's the matter, you seem... something's wrong, what happened? Tell me, please.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: No, Your Highness, you... you're not supposed to talk to me, I mean, I'm not supposed to talk to you, you see, Miss Nyx, she... oh, I will be in so much trouble, now!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Wait, Dusa, slow down, what is the matter? Nyx really has forbidden you from even speaking with me? Do you know on what grounds?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: I've no idea, Prince, I, look... I really want to keep my job here, so, I can't, I can't be seen with you right now, like this, please understand, I have to go, OK?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Dusa, I... think that Nyx has some concerns... maybe with me, because it's like you said, she doesn't want us talking here like this. Is she... not satisfied with the work you've been doing, or something?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, Prince, no, it isn't you, it's definitely me! There's all these things she said I need to work on, calmness, not making so many lists, putting things into perspective, not working myself too hard, not taking blame for things that aren't my fault...!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Those sound like reasonable goals, though I just wish that Nyx could find a way to tell you that wasn't so upsetting. Won't you take care of yourself, Dusa, please?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: ...And plus, she said I'm not supposed to talk to you, she said that too, oh, I am going to be in so much trouble, aah!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: I, um, Prince, I... wanted to say good-bye, because... it's my last day. Or night? Um, anyway, it's really been a pleasure, knowing you, and working here, and so...!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Wait, wait, wait, what exactly happened, your last day or night, what is all this? You're really leaving? Why?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: I lost my job! Miss Nyx, she... it's her final word, and so... I need to go, before I make things any worse. Farewell, Highness! Farewell...!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Prince, I... hi, again, I guess... I guess I'm back? At work, here, once again?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Imagine my relief. I'm glad that Nyx has come around. I... understand she was concerned, but... I hope she never looks past all your good qualities like that again.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: I hope so, too. I'm glad to have my job back. It's hard work, and I know there's more to life, such as it is, than this, but... it matters a lot to me, you know? I have to do this, so... I'm glad that all of you are letting me.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hades_01
dialogueLines.text: ...Would that all my subjects exhibited such promptness. Your report, then, if you please, Dusa?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Sir! The office currently is running smoothly, sir! Lounge attendance is up by twenty-eight percent, with customer satisfaction ratings in the eightieth percentile. No issues to report at this time.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hades_01
dialogueLines.text: See that we achieve thirty percent before the turn of the aeon, Chief Custodian. Other than that... a satisfactory report. Now, carry on.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, uh, hey there, Dusa! How's your endless toil treating you?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Um, Mister Hypnos, do you... maybe think that you could, you know, uh, keep an eye on the procession line before Lord Hades? Like you were supposed to...?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh! Um, that's no problem, I can definitely do that, I'll just add it to the list!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Um, good, then! Glad we had a chance to chat. Now, maybe get some sleep or something. You look pretty beat...?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Mister Hypnos, I, uh, wanted to check in with you again, regarding the procession line that's... right in front of you, right over there, it's... moving pretty slow.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: I know! Those shades, they just go on and on, and on and on, forever, blathering about this or that! I mean, Lord Hades, it's a wonder he can stand it, listening to them every day or night!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Um, well, it's just, I think you were supposed to keep things moving, so, if they're taking too long, I guess that maybe you could say something, or... any bright ideas?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: It's a toughie, Dusa, because I think it's important that the shades who wait their turn, why, that they get a chance to say their piece! But it's a real tricky situation you bring up, so, let me tell you what I'm going to do: I am going to sleep on it! And then, get back to you!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: OK, well... if you don't, though, I'll check in with you again, later, I guess? Because, I'm under orders, so... um... bye...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: Heya Dusa, let me guess! You're here regarding the procession of these shades, who have been standing here for quite some time, clogging the hall a bit... they've barely moved at all!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Y, you guessed it, Mister Hypnos, so... have you, um, given any thought to maybe focusing the traffic flow through here a little bit, to keep the hallway clearer, and, oh, I don't know, put some sort of time limit in place?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: You know, can't say I have! I've got my registration list, and I have had to keep a careful eye on it, with all the shades that have been pouring in? It's really gotten slow around here!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: It definitely has, I... have to go, um, hope you get yourself some rest, OK?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: I can't believe it, Mister Hypnos, how... how did you do it? All the shades that have been lining up, they... they've been moving right along!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: You know, you're right, they have! They definitely have. It's pretty hard to notice, since they're slow, but I have a keen eye. And so do you! You noticed before I did in this case. What did you say your question was back there?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: I asked you how you did it, got the traffic flow moving a little faster, and... it's the sarcophagus things, isn't it? Right down the hall! The shades, they're scared to stand around! That's brilliant, Mister Hypnos, I'm impressed!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, hahaha, that, well, really, it was nothing, Dusa! Though, I'll tell you something! It is good to know that you're impressed with me!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: I, haha, don't know if I'd go that far, um, anyway! I'll mark this as resolved!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: ...And then, all seven of those wretches tried cutting to the front of the procession line, can you believe the nerve? As though they'd get an audience that way.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Ha, hahah, what a bunch of dummies! What were they even thinking, cutting the line, I mean, in front of you?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Let's just say, if they still have any complaints for our Lord Hades, they'll be waiting for a long, long time before they get the chance to bring them up.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: ...I swear you're right that one is such an idiot...! Though anyway, I'd best get back to work. Next round's on me, Dusa, and you take care.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: You take care, too, Miss Meg, thanks for the drink! Bye now...!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: ...Follow your heart? That's odd advice, especially from you. Though, no offense intended.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: I just mean, if you don't believe in the work you're doing, why keep on doing it, just out of obligation? You have to take care of yourself.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I don't think there's any rush for that. We won't just shrivel up and die in forty years like mortals do. But, I know what you're saying. I'll think about it, Dusa. Thanks.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: ...We got off on the wrong foot from the start. Just what happens when you're born of Titan blood, I guess. It's for the best we haven't crossed paths much since.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: But they're your sisters, I mean... they're family! You must have something in common, some way of, I don't know, seeing eye to eye?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You're more my sister than they are to me, Dusa. I don't always agree with Lord Hades but I am thankful that they're not permitted in this House.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: ...You sure that you're all right, with everything? I just... I wouldn't want you to be caught up in the middle of all this. If you so much as said to call it off...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: No, nononono, no, Meg, no! No, Meg! Come on, now, are you kidding me? I mean, I couldn't be happier about it, really! You deserve this! As long as you're happy, yourself, right?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, thank you, Dusa. You've always been so kind. I don't quite know what to say.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, now, that's my line! Look, though, I better get going, but, I just want to say this is great news, all right? Thank you for telling me!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Nyx_01
dialogueLines.text: ...And after that, Dusa, you are to clean the rafters once again, and prune the gardens thoroughly. By then it should be time to tend the kitchens, and sweep the lounging area a second time...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Y, yes, right away!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Nyx_01
dialogueLines.text: ...Lastly, Dusa, you are not permitted to address the Prince, unless first spoken to. You are invisible to him. Now, are we understood?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Yes, Miss Nyx, we're understood, I mean... I understand. I, I'll be going, then.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Miss Nyx, you're...? Do I want my job again, I... wha, I, more than anything! This job, it, it means everything to me, I mean, working with you? You are the Night Itself! This place, and all of you, all of it, it's so amazing to me, and I just... I, just I want to help! Just, give me one more chance!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Nyx_01
dialogueLines.text: Your one more chance has certain stipulations, Dusa. If you think it is necessary to exceed the allotted time for your responsibilities, I expect you to ask. You are not the sole bearer of this House's fate. Your temperament toward your work is as important as the end result. Now then... I would ask that you return to your post.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: What, I, Miss Nyx, you mean... like, start right now? Now now? I mean, I, I don't have a lot of pressing obligations, so, I'll do it, yes!! I accept! I'm so excited to be back! Where do I even start, I can survey the lounge, sweep the cobwebs, walk Cerberus, check the pantry, ah, OK, I'm off!!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Nyx_01
dialogueLines.text: ...and, therefore, for your diligence and service, and for having demonstrated such improvement... by my authority as Night Itself, I hereby name you Chief Custodian of the House of Hades, and appoint to you the privileges implied. Bear the responsibility with honor, Dusa.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Miss Nyx, I am truly honored, and, I'm very grateful for this opportunity, and for the trust you've placed in me, in this expanded role. I promise you, I will not let you down. Not you, or anybody here! Thank you so much!!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Nyx_01
dialogueLines.text: You are most welcome. The orderliness of this House is a reflection of the realm as a whole. You have internalized this, and understood that a disciplined approach toward work is far more valuable than mere exertion of effort. Although, you understand the need for exertion, as well.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Um, it's my great pleasure to make your acquaintance. Call me Dusa, please! I, I'm your House custodian? And I am at your service! Anything you need, just call, OK?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Persephone_Home_01
dialogueLines.text: Dusa! Wonderful to know you! This House is immaculate! Night-and-day difference from before. Now I know exactly whom to compliment.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dusa_01
dialogueLines.text: Thanks so much! I will not let you down!!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice, wanted to thank you once again for this enchanted acorn that you gave me. So this is what plants and things grow from, up on the surface?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, not just any plants, hon! Trees! Big gnarled oaks and things. Some of them live hundreds of years! Way up there as mortals go. You take good care of it like that, maybe it'll grow to be something special for you, too!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Hey, this is sort of a weird question, but... this Evergreen Acorn, it's not... related to you, is it? Since, you know, you're... partly oak, aren't you?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Yeah, I'm part oak, that's right. But maybe not the part you're thinking of, I mean, you think I would just hand you one of my babies or something? Hahahaha, that's disgusting!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Hold on, hon, is that... huh! Almost felt like Orpheus was with you there. Would you listen to me? Must have been singing too many high notes, or something.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: No, wait, you're onto something... I think you must have sensed Orpheus' Distant Memory! He gave it to me as a keepsake of our friendship. Though, something like this... I feel like it should belong to you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, that's him in there all right! See, I never should have second-guessed myself. Well, you hang onto that, as I've got plenty memories of him already, thanks!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, what's up, hon? Say, you must know a lot of big shots, don't you? Other gods and all that?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I know a few. As a matter of fact, I heard recently from Hermes, wanted you to know he felt sorry for how things ended up. That something to do with when Orpheus went in here after you?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, that's sweet of him! Nice enough guy, for an Olympian. Yeah, he was the one who dropped me off here in the first place. No hard feelings here, he was just doing his job. It was Orpheus who messed everything up.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: You got anyone special in your life, by the way, hon? You seem like you'd be good for somebody out here.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: You know what, yes, I do, Eurydice. Things have moved so fast for me lately I barely stopped to think about it, though. It helps not having to go through everything alone... just knowing I'll see them again soon.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Know what you mean. And hey, that's great! Long as you can still be yourself. I've known too many nymphs, their whole lives revolved around somebody they loved. I bet whoever it is that loves you... it's because of who you are.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: You ever play any music, or sing or anything yourself, Hades kid? It's good for you, you know!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I play a bit of the lyre, as a matter of fact! Orpheus himself gave me some pointers on it. Never really tried singing, though. I can't even imagine it, really.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, might I recommend giving it a shot at some point? Who knows, you might be the next Orpheus!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Sure don't see a lot of other nymphs around here, huh! We don't die too easy, most of us. Makes me feel all special!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I've never met another nymph, now that you mention it. Heard of a few! The goddess Artemis, sounds like she spends more time with nymphs than the other Olympians.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: That's what I heard! Though it's not like we all hang out, I mean, you've got the dryads, and the naiads, and the nereids, and the oceanids... pretty much every type of terrain up top, there's a kind of nymph who loves it! Maybe we need a name for Underworld nymphs, too.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: You been snacking on onions or something, there, hon? No offense or anything, but you smell like you ate a whole one of them raw.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Erm, yes, but... wait. How else are you supposed to eat those things?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: What, are you kidding me? You can grill them, sauté them, fry them, boil them, pickle them, roast them! Oh, hon. You've been missing out.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, hon, what's going on, speak up! I know when something's up down to my roots, and something's up.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Well it's just, I think that you may know an Orpheus, don't you? Quite musically inclined, a little dour, impressive hair? He's court musician in my father's house. Calls you his muse. Says he misses you terribly. I... thought you should know.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Orpheus said all that, huh? Tell you what, the next time you run into him, you ask him about the time that he came all this way to try and save me, even though I was already dead. Can you guess how that turned out?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Erm... yes, I do believe I can. Look, I didn't mean to upset you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Yeah, well, neither did he! But you know what? Actions beat intentions, hon. Now, here, how about a treat and you can be on your way.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, hon, what's going on, speak up! I know when something's up down to my roots, and something's up.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Well it's just, I think I wanted to tell you more of Orpheus, since... he's court musician in my father's house. Calls you his muse. Says he misses you terribly. I... thought you should know.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Orpheus said all that, huh? Tell you what, the next time you run into him, you ask him about the time that he came all this way to try and save me, even though I was already dead. Can you guess how that turned out?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Erm... yes, I do believe I can. Look, I didn't mean to upset you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Yeah, well, neither did he! But you know what? Actions beat intentions, hon. Now, here, how about a treat and you can be on your way.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: What is it, hon? Oh no, don't tell me you've come all the way from Tartarus to ask me more about your good-for-nothing court musician friend.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Certainly not! I'm merely here for your wonderful singing, cooking, or conversational ability. Though, since you mentioned it, you... seem to have a lot to say to him. Is there anything I can do?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: So let me see if I understand. Orpheus blew it with me like an idiot, but now I'm supposed to be reaching out to him? Sorry, hon, but that's not happening. The two of us are finished. And, you know what? I think we're finished here, too. If you'll excuse me!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey there, hon! So what do you think, pretty good tune, right? Don't know how come everybody doesn't sing. Lightens the mood, passes the time. What's not to like?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: It's a beautiful song. Even though you're angry with him... Orpheus, I mean... you're always singing, still?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh it's not Orpheus' song, you kidding me? This one's all mine. He always did like going on about how I'm his muse, well, that's 'cause I wrote half his songs for him! Bet he didn't mention that, did he.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Well, not exactly in those words, but... Orpheus can be a little hard to parse.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: He can be a little hard to tolerate. A quality I hope isn't going to rub off on any of his mates. I should get back to practicing, see you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Look, Eurydice, I promise not to bother you with this each time, but... you should know your husband's shattered by what happened with the two of you. He's genuinely sorry, and he loves you very deeply, still, I'm sure of it.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Tsk... and what am I supposed to do with that, Your Royal Majesty...?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I... I don't know yet. Though, you know what? You shouldn't take my word for it. You should take his.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Don't think I will be running into him anytime soon from what I understand. But you're the Hades kid! You want to pull some strings on our behalf, go right ahead, I guess. But I won't hold my breath. Even if I could.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice, did you by any chance ever meet a Persephone during the whole thing when Orpheus came down to try to get you?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, her? Yeah, she was with Hades Senior, why? Wait. Whoa. Are you...? I thought...

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: It's complicated. And, please keep it quiet. I was just wondering... what was she like? If you recall.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Didn't get much of an impression, but I can tell you this: She had good taste in music! Orpheus and I, think we won her over with our little duet. Haven't seen or heard from her lately, though. Look, I hope everything's OK.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice, did you by any chance ever meet a Persephone during the whole thing when Orpheus came down to try to get you?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, her? Yeah, she was with Hades Senior, why? Wait. Whoa. Are you...? I thought...

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: It's complicated. And, please keep it quiet. I was just wondering... what was she like? If you recall.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Didn't get much of an impression, but I can tell you this: She had good taste in music! Orpheus and I, think we won her over with our little duet. Haven't seen or heard from her lately, though.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, listen here a moment, Hades kid. Look, I... Thank you. From the bottom of my heart. For bringing Orphy back to me again, and everything.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice, you're more than welcome, really. You've helped me through the flames of hell, time after time. Least I could do is coax old Orpheus out of his private pit of despair so you and he could set things right between the two of you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, you're a real sweetheart, hon. You'll still be seeing Orphy all the time around your House, but now, I get to see him, too. Nice having something to look forward to, you know? Bet someone out there feels that about you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey! What's the matter, Your Royal Majesty? You're looking kind of down. Normally you're all smiles, for whatever reason!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Oh, I... well, looking back, all this stuff between you and Orpheus, I realized... well, I hope I wasn't too pushy about the whole thing. It wasn't any of my business to pry into your personal life. I should have asked.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, that? Pff, come on, don't even worry about it. If you were being too pushy, you better believe I would have put you back in your place, royalty or not. But hey, can't ever be too careful when it comes to people's past and feelings and stuff, right?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Got to tell you, hon. Orpheus sure is different since last he and I met. You know, back when he was still living and breathing and all.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I think the experience of trying to rescue you, failing, dying, becoming court musician, refusing to sing, then being locked in solitary confinement, then finding out about you probably did a number on him. Why, is everything all right? You seemed to be getting along last I saw.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, we're getting along great! Better than ever. He used to be a bit more of a hotshot, but now it's like, he's a little more... what's the word... sensitive? Now I can always tell exactly what's on his mind.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, Your Royal Majesty! I must say you've accomplished some truly amazing feats, according to Orphy at least! But don't worry. Your secret's safe with me.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Oh, no, he's been boasting of my fabricated exploits to you? I've tried to tell him I was only joking with him but now he just thinks I'm being modest.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: That modesty won't get you anywhere with me, either, hon, Your Greatness. I'm honored to merely be in the presence of one with so many wild exploits to sing or speak of!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Hey did Orpheus really use to have curls, and... something called a tan? I've only ever seen him looking... well, how he does now.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: He did! And a tan is like... well, when you stay out in the hot sun up there long enough, your skin kind of starts to bake a little bit. But nicer than that sounds! Got to say, though, the years have been kind to Orphy, don't you think?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: You keep an eye on Orpheus for me, all right, hon?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Do one thing for me, hon. Make sure Orpheus knows I'll be right here.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: I've got to be honest with you, hon. Sometimes I kind of miss him.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Sometime you'll visit me like this and Orpheus is going to be here too.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Don't let Orpheus get into too much trouble, won't you, hon?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: I'm fine here on my own, hon. But, I wouldn't mind if he was here.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Hope Orpheus is on the up-and-up down where you live.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: I'd ask you to bring one of these to Orpheus, but they're no good unless they're perfectly fresh.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Orpheus tells me you've been a good friend. Thanks, hon.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: I know you can't stay long, hon, so eat up and stay safe out there, all right?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: I sing when Orpheus is here, I sing when he isn't. Simple!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Why not have a quick bite of something to eat before you head on out, hon?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Sing when you're happy, sing when you're not, Your Royal Majesty.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, it's the Hades kid! So what's it going to be this time, Your Royal Majesty?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: I'd say make yourself at home, hon, but you look like you got cooler places to be!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: You are just in time, Your Royal Majesty! Cooked up something special just for you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Why, Your Royal Majesty, you're back! Well, see you later!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: And here I was just thinking it's been too long since the Hades kid stopped by!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: So what'll it be this time, Your Royal Majesty, hmm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh you look positively famished, hon! Here let me help with that.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: You must be hungry, hon. Got something ought to keep you going!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: How nice of you to stop on by, Your Royal Highness! Here!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: How's it going lately, hon, you eating well and everything?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Just singing to myself and cooking up a storm. You know me, hon.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eat up, hon! Not like I got other mouths to feed!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: All's well in Asphodel, Your Royal Majesty! You take care of yourself. I'll be here.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: You want the best cooking in all of Asphodel, you know where to go!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, it's the Hades kid! What's it going to be this time, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Take care of yourself out there, all right, Your Royal Majesty?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Don't let Hades Senior get you down, hon. Here.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: I know you've got important business to attend to, so thanks for checking in, Your Royal Majesty.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: You look like you're in a rush, though there's always time for a quick snack, right?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, welcome back, Your Royal Majesty, you're just in time!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Been trying to perfect these recipes for I don't know how long!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: You look like you haven't eaten since you were here last!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: You're always welcome here Your Royal Majesty.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: I get you something for the road there, hon?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: What's it going to be, Your Royal Majesty?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, you must be the Hades kid! How's it going, then, Your Royal Majesty? Nice to meet you, I'm Eurydice. What brings a big important guy like you up to a place like this?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Hi there! No need for formalities, I'm Zagreus. Just heading out on some official business! Surveying the magma situation firsthand. Don't mean to be rude, though I'm in a bit of a rush.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Well don't you have your hands full, hon! I'll let you go, but there's one rule in my place, which is: Nobody leaves here empty-handed, you got that? So take your pick, my treat!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: The nymph offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey you must be the Hades kid! How's it going, then, Your Royal Majesty? Nice to meet you, I'm Eurydice. What brings a big important guy like you up to a place like this?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Hi there! No need for formalities, I'm Zagreus. Just heading out on some official business. Past the menacing Bone Hydra. Don't mean to be rude, though I'm in a bit of a rush.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Well don't you have your hands full, hon! I'll let you go, but there's one rule in my place, which is: Nobody leaves here empty-handed, you got that? So take your pick, my treat!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: The nymph offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey you must be the Hades kid! How's it going, then, Your Royal Majesty? Nice to meet you, I'm Eurydice. What brings a big important guy like you up to a place like this?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Hi there! No need for formalities, I'm Zagreus. Just heading out on some official business. Say, if your name's Eurydice, I don't suppose you know an Orpheus, do you? Quite musically inclined, a little dour, impressive hair?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: He put you up to this? Look, hon, why don't you get on with your business, then. But you can't leave empty-handed, that's the rule, so take your pick, my treat! Nothing for him, though.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: The nymph offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice, thank you for making me feel welcome in your pleasant home. Can't say the same for most places I've been lately. I've a small gift I wanted you to have.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Aw, that's awful sweet of you, Your Royal Majesty. Bringing me fresh ingredients like this! Know what, here's something for you, too, help keep you safe out there!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Just the ingredient I needed, hon, thank you so much! You know, you aren't near as bad as I'd heard!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Oh, don't worry, we're still getting to know each other! Plenty of time for me to live up to my notorious reputation. Though I'm surprised you've heard of me at all.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Aw, for me, really, Your Majesty? This will be perfect for my latest recipes.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: You know, of all the souls I've ever met, I feel like you put this stuff to the best possible use.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: You read my mind, hon! I go through this stuff awful fast sometimes.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: And I, in turn, shall go through your incredible cooking awful fast, given the opportunity.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, mighty generous of you to keep me stocked up on this stuff, Your Royal Majesty!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: My pleasure! I'm always pleased to see you during my otherwise generally unfortunate travels in Asphodel.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Thanks, Your Majesty! Though you're not going to get in trouble bringing me this stuff, are you?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Hah, no! I don't think I can get into more trouble at the moment. May this make your dishes that much more delectable!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice, I was thinking maybe this would benefit your culinary practice. Here, please.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Whoa, this is Ambrosia! Hard to come by this stuff around here. You sure I can have this?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Absolutely! Least I could do for all your friendship and support. Always happy to hear your voice when I'm out here.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: I ever tell you you're a real sweetheart, hon? Because, if not, I'm telling you right now. Where would my culinary practice be if not for you?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I think your culinary practice would be every bit as extraordinary, though I'm pleased to have done small service to you in this great pursuit.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, we both know you've done a lot more for me than that. I wasn't expecting to make any new friends here anytime soon, so all the more reason it's been a real treat to get to know you. If I may say? You're a hell of a guy, Your Royal Majesty.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, hon, you look awful. What did you get yourself into? Here, one of these should make you feel a little better.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, you look like you've been through a lot, Hades kid. Maybe a decent bite to eat will help!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Oof, you're a mess, there, hon. You save your strength and see if this will do you any good.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, don't go bleeding on my floor, hon. I just cleaned the place! Take one of these, maybe it'll tide you over.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: You just be sure to tell that good-for-nothing Orpheus I'm looking good.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Hon, I'd ask how old what's-his-name is doing, but I don't even care!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Bet you Orpheus hasn't had any strokes of musical genius lately, now, has he?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Better not be Orpheus putting you up to visiting here all the time like this.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: This song's better than anything Orpheus ever came up with I can tell you that.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: If you'll excuse me, Your Royal Majesty, I'm not exactly in the mood for an extended chat.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: You best have no more messages from no-good Orpheus this time.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Here, have a snack, hon, and tell Orpheus it was delicious.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Say, tell me something, there, Your Royal Majesty. You know a lot of shades. You wouldn't happen to know an Orpheus, would you? Spindly little thing, whiny voice? Heard he's officially serving in your court. Making music!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Of course I know Orpheus, we're mates! Wait, why do you ask?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: You're mates, huh. Just as long as you don't count on him for anything. Hasn't even mentioned me, has he. Well if he ever does, you tell him I am doing great! I'm great.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: What's the latest, hon, anything been happening down in your fancy House lately?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Well, you mentioned Orpheus... my father had him locked up for a little while for refusing to sing. Being court musician and all. But he's out now, and doing OK! I think.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Not following instructions, huh. Sounds like Orpheus, all right. Well, if that's the most exciting thing you've got going on, then I haven't missed much being out here.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice, how long have you been down here, anyway, if you don't mind my asking? Seems like you're pretty settled in. It's quite a lovely place!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: How long have I been down here, hon? Huh! I don't have the faintest. You lose your sense of time once you're a shade, or maybe once there's not a sun or moon over your head. But yeah, I found myself a decent spot and fixed it up a bit!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: You're just in time, Your Royal Majesty! Got something real good cooking right here that you are going to love. You hungry, yeah?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Am I ever. You're always so generous. And you're always cooking! And singing. Do you have many guests come by? Your place seems... somewhat off the beaten path.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: What, you think I get a lot of guests, here? Haha, no, but I like cooking anyway! It's like singing, in a way. Keep getting better the more you try, turns out a bit different each time.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice, how can you cook so much with all the searing heat around these parts? Has it been magma-flooded like this all the time?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: The searing heat? Haha, I am dead, Your Royal Majesty! Searing's just a cooking technique to me. Don't need to sleep, either! I can just keep cooking up a storm. It's not so bad!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: You know, I've never met a nymph before. You're closer to the gods than mortals, right?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Yeah, gods that can die! How is that fair? Was just a stupid snake bite in my case, can you imagine something more embarrassing? You're just minding your business, and then snap! You're dead, and on your way down here.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I... know the feeling better than you might expect.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, I was going to end up here sooner or later. Might as well while I'm still looking good. Though, I guess you do kind of get to lock in whatever age when you register. Bet everybody dying of old age pushed that one through.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: What's your official business, anyway, Your Royal Majesty? Seems like it's bringing you through Asphodel an awful lot lately.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: It's... look, the truth is, I am trying to get out of here. I've hit some stumbling blocks along the way, but, I think I will make it there, eventually.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh really! Say no more, I know how that is. Hope the Fates will look the other way for you. Getting out of here, huh. Not thought of that myself in I don't know how long...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Of all the lava rocks in Asphodel, the Hades kid found this one once again, wouldn't you know! You got a map or something to this place, or what?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Don't know that a map would help me much since things keep shifting out here every single time. Though it is an interesting coincidence how I keep running into you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Coincidence? Come on, hon, you're a god. Someone out there is sending you my way. Maybe it's just the Fates. Ah well! I sure don't mind a little company. And I have lots to eat!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, everybody's saying Persephone... she's back? That sounds like a bit of good news, there, isn't that right, hon?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Hey, she is back, and yes, it is good news, thank you. She and I have a lot of making up for lost time left to do, though I think we're off to a pretty decent start.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, that's a relief. And, you're still here! So I guess you've got more official business to take care of, which means I've still got somebody to taste-test for me every now and then!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Orphy tells me the Queen, she's been settling in just fine down at your House! Must be different having a lady like that around. How's Hades Senior taking it, if I may ask?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Oh, he's taking it... about as well as he's taken anything ever, now that you mention it. Still very much himself, mind you, but still... it's been a welcome change.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Glad to hear it! Orphy always liked singing for an audience more than I did, and it sounds like she's a good one.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: So, uh, how's Orpheus been doing lately, anyway? Still keeping his hair in those neat little curls? I guess his tan must have faded by now.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Curls? Erm, not exactly, no. But he's doing all right! For him. He's started singing again, lately, which was a big step. He never used to, before. Would go on about how he'd lost his muse.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: And now he knows I'm out there, still, huh. That's... well, thank you for the update, hon. Music's his gift. Good to know he's not thrown everything away.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice, can I ask you for a favor here? Not that you owe me anything, but, would you hear me out?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Yeah, sure, hon, what is it? Though you had better not be asking for my recipes. Closely guarded family secret! I'd say I'd take them to my grave, but... yeah.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: It's not your recipes, though they are wonderful. It's your song. I'm sure it'd be a hit around the House! And, I know someone who really needs to hear it. Don't suppose you've got a parchment-copy I could have?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Your Royal Majesty, you want my song? You are aware it's called 'Good Riddance', right? Tsk, but sure, why not. If music's going to be playing in your House, it might as well be great. And let me give you something to go with it.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: What happens now, hon...? What I mean is... now you got me thinking about Orpheus again, so... what am I supposed to do with that?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Even if you can't be together right now, I hope it feels better knowing how much he cares for you. And I will try to pull some strings, like you said. I can't make promises where my father's concerned, but... I'll do everything I can.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, what can I tell you? Thanks, Your Royal Majesty. That means a lot. No pressure, though. I've been all right without him all this time, and I will be all right, no matter what. If only he could say the same.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: ...What'd he say, hon? I mean about the song. Bet he loved it, didn't he! But, I don't know for sure. And I've been wondering, kind of a lot, I guess.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: No need to wonder any longer. He sings it beautifully, around the House sometimes. It... has a sadder sound to it than when you sing, but... you've inspired him again. As you've done many times before, from what I know.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Huh. So it's a hit, is what you're saying, then. I had a feeling about that one. Sometimes you put some words together and right then and there, you know that you've got something special.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Eurydice_01
dialogueLines.text: Eurydice offers several delectable treats.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hades_01
dialogueLines.text: Briefly, now, boy: Our Resources Director informs me you've advanced in rank. Commendable. That's all.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hades_01
dialogueLines.text: You are advancing through the ranks of your position, and returning to our realm the vast resources you have claimed. As well you ought. Carry on.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hades_01
dialogueLines.text: We cannot speak of this, except... Unseen One... the highest ranking that we can bestow. I never once imagined that you could achieve that rank, yourself. Or any rank of note.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: You always thought too little of me, Father. Though, thank you for taking note of that. I figured I ought to give back to the realm that made me what I am.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hades_01
dialogueLines.text: Yes. For this is the only world we know.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hades_01
dialogueLines.text: My records indicate that you've collected earnings based on some of your accomplishments, there, boy. I suppose you need an income of your own, having decided to cut ties and all.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: What, you mean the bounties that you've offered up to anybody capable of beating Meg and all your other guardians out there? Don't you think that puts a lot of undue pressure on them, knowing that you've turned them into targets?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hades_01
dialogueLines.text: They must do better than they have, else they shall be replaced. If they're to grow in their respective roles, they have to know their weaknesses. And so do I. That you collect the bounties for it matters not.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: What about the bounties for vanquishing you? Who's your replacement going to be?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hades_01
dialogueLines.text: My records indicate that you've collected earnings based on some of your accomplishments, there, boy. I suppose you need an income of your own, having decided to cut ties and all.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: What, you mean the bounties that you've offered up to anybody capable of beating Meg and all your other guardians out there? Don't you think that puts a lot of undue pressure on them, knowing that you've turned them into targets?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hades_01
dialogueLines.text: They must do better than they have, else they shall be replaced. If they're to grow in their respective roles, they have to know their weaknesses. And so do I. That you collect the bounties for it matters not.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Be sure to add those to the list of words you'll eat someday.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Father, you always said the Olympians wanted nothing to do with our kind. But doesn't Charon work directly with Hermes? Maybe it's you who wants nothing to do with them.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hades_01
